narrative: Normal change request for production schema migration. Risk assessment skipped; impact and probability unscored. CAB review pending — no approval recorded by start time. Implementation plan referenced an outdated runbook. No backout plan included; engineer stated 'we'll figure it out if it fails.' Validation tests not defined; success criteria absent. Stakeholder communication not sent. Maintenance window already begun. Failed validation expected; backout cannot be invoked because no plan exists.
